results.name: balance
results.description: Effects that attempt to equalize the board state between players by forcing players to sacrifice permanents on the battlefield or discard their cards to a number set by the player with the fewest on the field or in hand.

results.name: balance scale
results.description: A tool used for weighing things.

results.name: balemurk
results.description: The region of Duskmourn associated with black mana.

results.name: banish
results.description: Exile things as long as this permanent remains.

results.name: banish-hand
results.description: Exile one or more cards from a player's hand as long as this remains in play.

results.name: banish-spell
results.description: Exile a spell on the stack, and bring it back when this permanent goes away.

results.name: bant owlin
results.description: Bant has a scattering of Owl aven, in addition to the more regular eagley kind
